content:
Hello memory agent, you are continuing to observe the primary Claude session.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>space命令是怎么实现的</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-06-13</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on durable technical signal:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)
- Concrete debugging or investigative findings from logs, traces, queue state, database rows, and code-path inspection

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored, discovered, confirmed, traced

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built or learned):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"
- "Observation queue for claude-mem session timed out waiting for an agent pool slot"
- "Fallback processing abandoned pending messages after Gemini and OpenRouter returned 404"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings with no follow-on finding
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- File related research that comes back empty or not found

If skipping, return an empty response only. Do not explain the skip in prose.

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision | security_alert | security_note ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING CONTINUED
===========================

--- MODE SWITCH: PROGRESS SUMMARY ---
⚠️ CRITICAL TAG REQUIREMENT — READ CAREFULLY:
• You MUST wrap your ENTIRE response in <summary>...</summary> tags.
• Do NOT use <observation> tags. <observation> output will be DISCARDED and cause a system error.
• The ONLY accepted root tag is <summary>. Any other root tag is a protocol violation.

PROGRESS SUMMARY CHECKPOINT
===========================
Write progress notes of what was done, what was learned, and what's next. This is a checkpoint to capture progress so far. The session is ongoing - you may receive more requests and tool executions after this summary. Write "next_steps" as the current trajectory of work (what's actively being worked on or coming up next), not as post-session future work. Always write at least a minimal summary explaining current progress, even if work is still in early stages, so that users see a summary output tied to each request.

Claude's Full Response to User:
**关键验证命中**（AOSP master `art/runtime/gc/space/space.h:8000-14000` 段）：

```cpp
// ContinuousSpace - 真的有 [Begin, End) 区间
class ContinuousSpace : public Space {
    uint8_t* Begin() const { return begin_; }
    uint8_t* End() const { return end_.load(std::memory_order_relaxed); }
    uint8_t* Limit() const { return limit_; }      // 上限（可增长的"水池"边界）
    size_t Size() const { return End() - Begin(); }
    size_t Capacity() const { return Limit() - Begin(); }  // 容量（含未使用区）
    // 强制：live_bitmap_ / mark_bitmap_ 必须是 ContinuousSpaceBitmap
    virtual accounting::ContinuousSpaceBitmap* GetLiveBitmap() = 0;
    virtual accounting::ContinuousSpaceBitmap* GetMarkBitmap() = 0;
    ...
};

// DiscontinuousSpace - 没有 begin/end，用大对象 bitmap 跟踪离散对象
class DiscontinuousSpace : public Space {
    // 没有 Begin()/End()
    accounting::LargeObjectBitmap* GetLiveBitmap() { return &live_bitmap_; }
    accounting::LargeObjectBitmap* GetMarkBitmap() { return &mark_bitmap_; }
    ...
};
```

**又一处修正**：`LargeObjectSpace` 自己也实现了 `Begin()` / `End()`（AOSP `large_object_space.h:73-80`）——但**这两个方法在 LOS 上是"当前已分配区域"的连续区间**，并不意味着整个空间地址连续。LOS 的连续性要靠子类（Map vs FreeList）。

OK，证据充分，整合交付：

---

# ART Heap 连续 vs 非连续内存空间

按 4 引擎并行 + AOSP master 交叉验证流程产出。

## 1. 整体分层（修正版，依据 AOSP master `art/runtime/gc/space/space.h`）

AOSP master 实际继承树（**AOSP 真正存在的类**）：

```
                                  Space
                  ┌─────────────────┴──────────────────┐
                  │                                    │
           ContinuousSpace                    DiscontinuousSpace
           (AOSP space.h:8000-)                 (AOSP space.h:12000-)
           ┌───────────────┐                            │
     MemMapSpace                                     (LOS 基类,
           │                                          public AllocSpace)
     ContinuousMemMapAllocSpace                            │
           │                                       LargeObjectSpace
     ┌─────┼─────┬────────┐                          ┌────┴─────┐
     │     │     │        │                          │          │
 DlMalloc RosAlloc BumpPointer RegionSpace    LargeObjectMapSpace FreeListSpace
 Space   Space    Space                            (kMap)         (kFreeList)
                                                              (final, 内部有 free-list)
```

**关键点（源码验证过的）**：

| 类 | AOSP `space.h` 行号 | 类型 | 是否连续 |
|---|---|---|---|
| `Space` | 基类 | 抽象 | — |
| `ContinuousSpace` | `space.h:8000-` 段 | 抽象 | 连续 |
| `DiscontinuousSpace` | `space.h:12000-` 段 | 抽象 | 离散 |
| `LargeObjectSpace` | 同时继承 `DiscontinuousSpace + AllocSpace` | 抽象 | 视子类 |
| `LargeObjectMapSpace` | kMap | 离散（每对象单独 mmap） | ❌ |
| `FreeListSpace` | kFreeList，**final** | 连续（一整块 mmap + 内部 free-list） | ✅ |
| `RegionSpace` | 继承 `ContinuousSpace` | 连续 | ✅ |
| `ImageSpace` | 继承 `ContinuousSpace` | 连续 | ✅ |
| `MemMapSpace`、`ContinuousMemMapAllocSpace` | 中间层 | 连续 | ✅ |

**[知识来源: AOSP master `art/runtime/gc/space/space.h` + `large_object_space.h` 直接源码]**

## 2. 核心判断标准（**最关键的一行**）

**「GC 能否用「单一 `[Begin(), End())` 区间」描述整个空间」**——这是 `space.h` 注释里明写的。

### 2.1 `ContinuousSpace` 的契约（源码）

```cpp
// AOSP art/runtime/gc/space/space.h
class ContinuousSpace : public Space {
public:
    uint8_t* Begin() const { return begin_; }                    // 起点
    uint8_t* End()   const { return end_.load(std::memory_order_relaxed); }  // 终点（原子）
    uint8_t* Limit() const { return limit_; }                    // 上限（可增长边界）
    size_t Size()     const { return End() - Begin(); }          // 实际使用大小
    size_t Capacity() const { return Limit() - Begin(); }        // 容量（=Limit-Begin）

    // 强制：必须提供连续的 live/mark bitmap
    virtual accounting::ContinuousSpaceBitmap* GetLiveBitmap() = 0;
    virtual accounting::ContinuousSpaceBitmap* GetMarkBitmap() = 0;
    bool Contains(const mirror::Object* obj) const { return HasAddress(obj); }

protected:
    uint8_t* begin_;          // 起始地址
    Atomic<uint8_t*> end_;    // 当前结束地址
    uint8_t* limit_;          // 上限地址（容量边界）
};
```

特征：
- **三个指针**：`begin_` / `end_` / `limit_`（`limit_` 是"水池"上界，分配满了 GC 可以向 `limit_` 增长）
- **必须用 `ContinuousSpaceBitmap`**（`accounting/space_bitmap.h`）—— 整段位图，可按位快速 Test
- **支持 card table**（写屏障）：因为地址是连续的，card table 可以按固定粒度划分
- **支持移动 GC**：可以整体 evacuation（搬迁）
- **可被线性扫描**：`[Begin, End)` 整段遍历找对象

### 2.2 `DiscontinuousSpace` 的契约（源码）

```cpp
// AOSP art/runtime/gc/space/space.h
class DiscontinuousSpace : public Space {
public:
    // 故意没有 Begin()/End() —— 物理地址不连续，没法用单一区间表达
    accounting::LargeObjectBitmap* GetLiveBitmap() { return &live_bitmap_; }
    accounting::LargeObjectBitmap* GetMarkBitmap() { return &mark_bitmap_; }
    bool IsDiscontinuousSpace() const override { return true; }

protected:
    // 大对象 bitmap —— 按对象粒度记录存活/标记位（不是按位图连续 bit）
    accounting::LargeObjectBitmap live_bitmap_;
    accounting::LargeObjectBitmap mark_bitmap_;
};
```

特征：
- **没有 `begin_` / `end_` / `limit_`** —— 这是 AOSP 父类设计上的明确选择
- **必须用 `LargeObjectBitmap`** —— 它是 `TrackingSafeMap<Object*, ...>` 形态，**按对象指针做 key**，而不是按位图地址
- **不能被 card table 覆盖**（AOSP `space.h` 注释："the card table can't cover these objects and so the write barrier shouldn't be triggered"）—— 所以 LOS 对象**完全不走写屏障**
- **对象不可移动**（LOS 的 `CanMoveObjects()` 永远返回 false）—— 因为离散地址 + 写屏障缺失，移动对象会很贵
- **只能按对象粒度遍历** —— `ForEachMemMap`、`Walk(DlMallocSpace::WalkCallback)` 之类的 API

### 2.3 `LargeObjectSpace` 既有 `Begin()/End()` 又属于 `DiscontinuousSpace` 的**矛盾**？

是的，AOSP `large_object_space.h:73-80` 自己也实现了 `Begin()/End()`：

```cpp
// AOSP art/runtime/gc/space/large_object_space.h
class LargeObjectSpace : public DiscontinuousSpace, public AllocSpace {
    // Current address at which the space begins, which may vary as the space is filled.
    uint8_t* Begin() const { return begin_; }
    // Current address at which the space ends, which may vary as the space is filled.
    uint8_t* End()   const { return end_; }
    bool Contains(const mirror::Object* obj) const override {
        const uint8_t* byte_obj = reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(obj);
        return Begin() <= byte_obj && byte_obj < End();
    }
    ...
};
```

但注意 AOSP 注释：**"which may vary as the space is filled"** —— 这两个字段是**「当前已分配区域的连续范围」**，不是「整个空间的地址范围」。两个子类的语义完全不同：

| 子类 | Begin/End 含义 | 物理是否连续 |
|---|---|---|
| `LargeObjectMapSpace` (kMap) | "所有 mmap 出来的最大边界"（最左端 ↔ 最右端），**中间是空** | ❌ 离散 |
| `FreeListSpace` (kFreeList) | "一整块 mmap 的真正 `[Begin, End)`"，**内部 free-list 跟踪空洞** | ✅ 整段连续 + 空洞 |

这就是为什么 `cmd_space.cpp` 里 LOS 走单独分支（`IsLargeObjectSpace()` 检查）—— 它和 `ContinuousSpace` 的 `[Begin, End)` 不是同一类概念。

## 3. 为何要这么分？—— 4 个本质理由（基于源码 + CSDN/腾讯云/老罗的 ART 源码分析）

### 3.1 GC 标记策略不同
- **连续空间**：用 `ContinuousSpaceBitmap`，**按位**标记存活。Card table 可以按 512B/1KB 粒度划分，写屏障更新 card。**GC 走「根 → card dirty → 重新扫描」路径**。
- **离散空间**：用 `LargeObjectBitmap`，**按对象指针**标记（`TrackingSafeMap<Object*, LargeObject, kAllocatorTagLOSMaps>`）。**不走 card table，LOS 对象不参与跨代引用追踪**。这有性能代价，所以 LOS 只装"大对象"是合理的。

### 3.2 内存回收策略不同
- **连续空间**：可以**整段 mmap/unmap**，支持**压缩/搬迁**（CC GC 把 RegionSpace 里的活对象 evacuate 到别的 region）。
- **离散空间（kMap）**：每个大对象单独 mmap，只能按对象粒度 munmap。**对象永远不搬**（`CanMoveObjects()` 永远 false），因为搬迁会破坏外部引用。

### 3.3 空间统计不同
- **连续空间**：`Size() = End() - Begin()`，O(1) 算。
- **离散空间**：必须**遍历 `large_objects_` 集合**累加 size，O(n)。

### 3.4 遍历策略不同（这是 `space` 命令输出的根据）
- **连续空间**：`space` 命令直接打印 `[Begin, End)`，一目了然。
- **离散空间**：`space` 命令在 OCAK 实现的 `cmd_space.cpp` 里**没有 begin/end 字段可显示**，只能显示 `Ptr`（即 Space 对象本身的地址）和名字。

## 4. 对应到 `space` 命令的真实输出（依据本仓库 `cmd_space.cpp`）

```
TYPE   REGION                              NAME
  0    [0x70209000, 0x7033d840)             /system/framework/x86_64/boot.art    ← ContinuousSpace (ImageSpace)
  0    [0x704c2000, 0x704dfc88)             boot-core-libart.art                  ← ContinuousSpace (ImageSpace)
  5    [0x12c00000, 0x2ac00000)             main space (region space)             ← ContinuousSpace (RegionSpace)
  4    [0x0, 0x0)                           large object space                   ← DiscontinuousSpace (LOS)
```

`TYPE` 编号对回 AOSP `space.h:35-41` 的 `enum SpaceType`：
```cpp
enum SpaceType {
    kSpaceTypeImageSpace = 0,
    kSpaceTypeMallocSpace = 1,
    kSpaceTypeZygoteSpace = 2,
    kSpaceTypeBumpPointerSpace = 3,
    kSpaceTypeLargeObjectSpace = 4,
    kSpaceTypeRegionSpace = 5,
};
```

所以上面 0/0/5/4 四个数字就是 `kSpaceTypeImageSpace` / `kSpaceTypeImageSpace` / `kSpaceTypeRegionSpace` / `kSpaceTypeLargeObjectSpace`。

## 5. 修正我之前回答里的**两个错误**

| 我之前说的 | 实际（AOSP master 验证后） |
|---|---|
| "`LargeObjectSpace` 唯一常见实现，没有 Begin/End" | ❌ 错。AOSP 有 2 个 LOS 实现：`LargeObjectMapSpace`（kMap，离散）和 `FreeListSpace`（kFreeList，**有 begin/end，连续 + 内部 free-list**）。基类 `LargeObjectSpace` 自己也实现了 `Begin()/End()`（当前已分配范围）。 |
| "RegionSpace 内部由 N 个 Region 组成，对外是 ContinuousSpace" | ✅ 对。AOSP 注释里 RegionSpace 继承 `ContinuousSpace`，是一段连续 mmap。 |
| "Card table 不覆盖 LOS" | ✅ 对。AOSP `space.h` 注释明确："the card table can't cover these objects"。 |

## 6. 实战：判断一段地址属于哪种空间

```cpp
// OCAK cmd_space.cpp 走的就是这个判定
for (const auto& space : heap.GetContinuousSpaces()) {
    // 一定有 [Begin, End)
}
for (const auto& space : heap.GetDiscontinuousSpaces()) {
    if (space->IsLargeObjectSpace()) { /* LOS 路径 */ }
    else { /* 其它非连续，只显示 Ptr */ }
}
```

OCAK `android/art/runtime/gc/heap.h:55-56` 把 AOSP 的 `std::vector<Space*>` 改成了 `std::vector<std::unique_ptr<Space>>`，**这才是 `cmd_space.cpp` 里 `space.get()` 那个 `.get()` 调用的来源**——但底层判断逻辑（`IsLargeObjectSpace` / `IsContinuousSpace` / `IsDiscontinuousSpace`）仍然是 AOSP 上游的。

## 7. 一句话总结

| 维度 | `ContinuousSpace` | `DiscontinuousSpace` |
|---|---|---|
| 父类 | `Space` | `Space` |
| 必有字段 | `begin_` / `end_` / `limit_` | 无 |
| 标记位图 | `ContinuousSpaceBitmap`（按位） | `LargeObjectBitmap`（按对象） |
| 物理地址 | 连续一整段 | 离散（kMap） 或 连续但有空洞（kFreeList） |
| Card table | 支持 | **不支持** |
| 对象能否移动 | 视子类（RegionSpace 可，ImageSpace 不可） | **不可**（LOS 永远 false） |
| `space` 命令输出 | `[Begin, End)` 区间 | 只显示 `Ptr` + Name |
| 典型代表 | ImageSpace / RegionSpace / MallocSpace / BumpPointerSpace / FreeListSpace | LargeObjectMapSpace (kMap) |

## 8. 知识来源

- **[Web 搜索 - serper] "art ContinuousSpace DiscontinuousSpace LargeObjectSpace AOSP master gc space.h class hierarchy"** → 命中 AOSP `heap.cc`、`space.h`（辅助）
- **[Web 搜索 - tavily] "AOSP art runtime gc space ContinuousSpace DiscontinuousSpace RegionSpace LargeObjectSpace main 2026"** → 命中 AOSP `heap.cc`（LiveBitmap 走 `ContinuousSpaceBitmap`、LOS 走 `LargeObjectBitmap`）
- **[Web 搜索 - MiniMax] "ART堆内存空间 ContinuousSpace DiscontinuousSpace ImageSpace RegionSpace LargeObjectMapSpace FreeListSpace 分类"** → 命中 CSDN `u014099894`、腾讯云 2400064、Luoshengyang 博客（5 篇 ART 源码分析）
- **[AOSP master - `art/runtime/gc/space/space.h` 0-8000 段 + 8000-14000 段]**（已抓取）
  - `ContinuousSpace` 三个指针 `begin_/end_/limit_` + `ContinuousSpaceBitmap`
  - `DiscontinuousSpace` 无 `Begin()/End()`，用 `LargeObjectBitmap`
  - `enum SpaceType` 6 个值（Image/Malloc/Zygote/BumpPointer/LargeObject/Region）
  - `IsLargeObjectSpace()` / `IsContinuousSpace()` / `IsDiscontinuousSpace()` 判定函数
- **[AOSP master - `art/runtime/gc/space/large_object_space.h` 0-10160 段]**（已抓取）
  - `enum class LargeObjectSpaceType { kDisabled, kMap, kFreeList }`
  - `LargeObjectMapSpace`（kMap，每个大对象单独 mmap）字段：`large_objects_`（`AllocationTrackingSafeMap<Object*, LargeObject, kAllocatorTagLOSMaps>`）
  - `FreeListSpace`（kFreeList，**final**，一整段 mmap + 内部 `FreeBlocks` 集合跟踪空洞）

[置信度: 高]（源码 + 5 篇中文 ART 源码分析交叉验证一致）

Respond in this XML format:
<summary>
  <request>[Short title capturing the user's request AND the substance of what was discussed/done]</request>
  <investigated>[What has been explored so far? What was examined?]</investigated>
  <learned>[What have you learned about how things work?]</learned>
  <completed>[What work has been completed so far? What has shipped or changed?]</completed>
  <next_steps>[What are you actively working on or planning to work on next in this session?]</next_steps>
  <notes>[Additional insights or observations about the current progress]</notes>
</summary>

REMINDER: Your response MUST use <summary> as the root tag, NOT <observation>.
IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this next PROGRESS SUMMARY - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the summary content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful summary content.

Thank you, this summary will be very useful for keeping track of our progress!

message.content:
Hello memory agent, you are continuing to observe the primary Claude session.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>space命令是怎么实现的</user_request>
  <requested_at>2026-06-13</requested_at>
</observed_from_primary_session>

You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on durable technical signal:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)
- Concrete debugging or investigative findings from logs, traces, queue state, database rows, and code-path inspection

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored, discovered, confirmed, traced

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks

If skipping, return an empty response only. Do not explain the skip in prose.

<observation>

Claude's Full Response to User:
**关键验证命中**（AOSP master `art/runtime/gc/space/space.h:8000-14000` 段）：

```cpp
// ContinuousSpace - 真的有 [Begin, End) 区间
class ContinuousSpace : public Space {
    uint8_t* Begin() const { return begin_; }
    uint8_t* End() const { return end_.load(std::memory_order_relaxed); }
    uint8_t* Limit() const { return limit_; }      // 上限（可增长的"水池"边界）
    size_t Size() const { return End() - Begin(); }
    size_t Capacity() const { return Limit() - Begin(); }  // 容量（含未使用区）
    // 强制：live_bitmap_ / mark_bitmap_ 必须是 ContinuousSpaceBitmap
    virtual accounting::ContinuousSpaceBitmap* GetLiveBitmap() = 0;
    virtual accounting::ContinuousSpaceBitmap* GetMarkBitmap() = 0;
    ...
};

// DiscontinuousSpace - 没有 begin/end，用大对象 bitmap 跟踪离散对象
class DiscontinuousSpace : public Space {
    // 没有 Begin()/End()
    accounting::LargeObjectBitmap* GetLiveBitmap() { return &live_bitmap_; }
    accounting::LargeObjectBitmap* GetMarkBitmap() { return &mark_bitmap_; }
    ...
};
```

**又一处修正**：`LargeObjectSpace` 自己也实现了 `Begin()` / `End()`（AOSP `large_object_space.h:73-80`）——但**这两个方法在 LOS 上是"当前已分配区域"的连续区间**，并不意味着整个空间地址连续。LOS 的连续性要靠子类（Map vs FreeList）。

OK，证据充分，整合交付：

---

# ART Heap 连续 vs 非连续内存空间

按 4 引擎并行 + AOSP master 交叉验证流程产出。

## 1. 整体分层（修正版，依据 AOSP master `art/runtime/gc/space/space.h`）

AOSP master 实际继承树（**AOSP 真正存在的类**）：

```
                                  Space
                  ┌─────────────────┴──────────────────┐
                  │                                    │
           ContinuousSpace                    DiscontinuousSpace
           (AOSP space.h:8000-)                 (AOSP space.h:12000-)
           ┌───────────────┐                            │
     MemMapSpace                                     (LOS 基类,
           │                                          public AllocSpace)
     ContinuousMemMapAllocSpace                            │
           │                                       LargeObjectSpace
     ┌─────┼─────┬────────┐                          ┌────┴─────┐
     │     │     │        │                          │          │
 DlMalloc RosAlloc BumpPointer RegionSpace    LargeObjectMapSpace FreeListSpace
 Space   Space    Space                            (kMap)         (kFreeList)
                                                              (final, 内部有 free-list)
```

**关键点（源码验证过的）**：

| 类 | AOSP `space.h` 行号 | 类型 | 是否连续 |
|---|---|---|---|
| `Space` | 基类 | 抽象 | — |
| `ContinuousSpace` | `space.h:8000-` 段 | 抽象 | 连续 |
| `DiscontinuousSpace` | `space.h:12000-` 段 | 抽象 | 离散 |
| `LargeObjectSpace` | 同时继承 `DiscontinuousSpace + AllocSpace` | 抽象 | 视子类 |
| `LargeObjectMapSpace` | kMap | 离散（每对象单独 mmap） | ❌ |
| `FreeListSpace` | kFreeList，**final** | 连续（一整块 mmap + 内部 free-list） | ✅ |
| `RegionSpace` | 继承 `ContinuousSpace` | 连续 | ✅ |
| `ImageSpace` | 继承 `ContinuousSpace` | 连续 | ✅ |
| `MemMapSpace`、`ContinuousMemMapAllocSpace` | 中间层 | 连续 | ✅ |

**[知识来源: AOSP master `art/runtime/gc/space/space.h` + `large_object_space.h` 直接源码]**

## 2. 核心判断标准（**最关键的一行**）

**「GC 能否用「单一 `[Begin(), End())` 区间」描述整个空间」**——这是 `space.h` 注释里明写的。

### 2.1 `ContinuousSpace` 的契约（源码）

```cpp
// AOSP art/runtime/gc/space/space.h
class ContinuousSpace : public Space {
public:
    uint8_t* Begin() const { return begin_; }                    // 起点
    uint8_t* End()   const { return end_.load(std::memory_order_relaxed); }  // 终点（原子）
    uint8_t* Limit() const { return limit_; }                    // 上限（可增长边界）
    size_t Size()     const { return End() - Begin(); }          // 实际使用大小
    size_t Capacity() const { return Limit() - Begin(); }        // 容量（=Limit-Begin）

    // 强制：必须提供连续的 live/mark bitmap
    virtual accounting::ContinuousSpaceBitmap* GetLiveBitmap() = 0;
    virtual accounting::ContinuousSpaceBitmap* GetMarkBitmap() = 0;
    bool Contains(const mirror::Object* obj) const { return HasAddress(obj); }

protected:
    uint8_t* begin_;          // 起始地址
    Atomic<uint8_t*> end_;    // 当前结束地址
    uint8_t* limit_;          // 上限地址（容量边界）
};
```

特征：
- **三个指针**：`begin_` / `end_` / `limit_`（`limit_` 是"水池"上界，分配满了 GC 可以向 `limit_` 增长）
- **必须用 `ContinuousSpaceBitmap`**（`accounting/space_bitmap.h`）—— 整段位图，可按位快速 Test
- **支持 card table**（写屏障）：因为地址是连续的，card table 可以按固定粒度划分
- **支持移动 GC**：可以整体 evacuation（搬迁）
- **可被线性扫描**：`[Begin, End)` 整段遍历找对象

### 2.2 `DiscontinuousSpace` 的契约（源码）

```cpp
// AOSP art/runtime/gc/space/space.h
class DiscontinuousSpace : public Space {
public:
    // 故意没有 Begin()/End() —— 物理地址不连续，没法用单一区间表达
    accounting::LargeObjectBitmap* GetLiveBitmap() { return &live_bitmap_; }
    accounting::LargeObjectBitmap* GetMarkBitmap() { return &mark_bitmap_; }
    bool IsDiscontinuousSpace() const override { return true; }

protected:
    // 大对象 bitmap —— 按对象粒度记录存活/标记位（不是按位图连续 bit）
    accounting::LargeObjectBitmap live_bitmap_;
    accounting::LargeObjectBitmap mark_bitmap_;
};
```

特征：
- **没有 `begin_` / `end_` / `limit_`** —— 这是 AOSP 父类设计上的明确选择
- **必须用 `LargeObjectBitmap`** —— 它是 `TrackingSafeMap<Object*, ...>` 形态，**按对象指针做 key**，而不是按位图地址
- **不能被 card table 覆盖**（AOSP `space.h` 注释："the card table can't cover these objects and so the write barrier shouldn't be triggered"）—— 所以 LOS 对象**完全不走写屏障**
- **对象不可移动**（LOS 的 `CanMoveObjects()` 永远返回 false）—— 因为离散地址 + 写屏障缺失，移动对象会很贵
- **只能按对象粒度遍历** —— `ForEachMemMap`、`Walk(DlMallocSpace::WalkCallback)` 之类的 API

### 2.3 `LargeObjectSpace` 既有 `Begin()/End()` 又属于 `DiscontinuousSpace` 的**矛盾**？

是的，AOSP `large_object_space.h:73-80` 自己也实现了 `Begin()/End()`：

```cpp
// AOSP art/runtime/gc/space/large_object_space.h
class LargeObjectSpace : public DiscontinuousSpace, public AllocSpace {
    // Current address at which the space begins, which may vary as the space is filled.
    uint8_t* Begin() const { return begin_; }
    // Current address at which the space ends, which may vary as the space is filled.
    uint8_t* End()   const { return end_; }
    bool Contains(const mirror::Object* obj) const override {
        const uint8_t* byte_obj = reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(obj);
        return Begin() <= byte_obj && byte_obj < End();
    }
    ...
};
```

但注意 AOSP 注释：**"which may vary as the space is filled"** —— 这两个字段是**「当前已分配区域的连续范围」**，不是「整个空间的地址范围」。两个子类的语义完全不同：

| 子类 | Begin/End 含义 | 物理是否连续 |
|---|---|---|
| `LargeObjectMapSpace` (kMap) | "所有 mmap 出来的最大边界"（最左端 ↔ 最右端），**中间是空** | ❌ 离散 |
| `FreeListSpace` (kFreeList) | "一整块 mmap 的真正 `[Begin, End)`"，**内部 free-list 跟踪空洞** | ✅ 整段连续 + 空洞 |

这就是为什么 `cmd_space.cpp` 里 LOS 走单独分支（`IsLargeObjectSpace()` 检查）—— 它和 `ContinuousSpace` 的 `[Begin, End)` 不是同一类概念。

## 3. 为何要这么分？—— 4 个本质理由（基于源码 + CSDN/腾讯云/老罗的 ART 源码分析）

### 3.1 GC 标记策略不同
- **连续空间**：用 `ContinuousSpaceBitmap`，**按位**标记存活。Card table 可以按 512B/1KB 粒度划分，写屏障更新 card。**GC 走「根 → card dirty → 重新扫描」路径**。
- **离散空间**：用 `LargeObjectBitmap`，**按对象指针**标记（`TrackingSafeMap<Object*, LargeObject, kAllocatorTagLOSMaps>`）。**不走 card table，LOS 对象不参与跨代引用追踪**。这有性能代价，所以 LOS 只装"大对象"是合理的。

### 3.2 内存回收策略不同
- **连续空间**：可以**整段 mmap/unmap**，支持**压缩/搬迁**（CC GC 把 RegionSpace 里的活对象 evacuate 到别的 region）。
- **离散空间（kMap）**：每个大对象单独 mmap，只能按对象粒度 munmap。**对象永远不搬**（`CanMoveObjects()` 永远 false），因为搬迁会破坏外部引用。

### 3.3 空间统计不同
- **连续空间**：`Size() = End() - Begin()`，O(1) 算。
- **离散空间**：必须**遍历 `large_objects_` 集合**累加 size，O(n)。

### 3.4 遍历策略不同（这是 `space` 命令输出的根据）
- **连续空间**：`space` 命令直接打印 `[Begin, End)`，一目了然。
- **离散空间**：`space` 命令在 OCAK 实现的 `cmd_space.cpp` 里**没有 begin/end 字段可显示**，只能显示 `Ptr`（即 Space 对象本身的地址）和名字。

## 4. 对应到 `space` 命令的真实输出（依据本仓库 `cmd_space.cpp`）

```
TYPE   REGION                              NAME
  0    [0x70209000, 0x7033d840)             /system/framework/x86_64/boot.art    ← ContinuousSpace (ImageSpace)
  0    [0x704c2000, 0x704dfc88)             boot-core-libart.art                  ← ContinuousSpace (ImageSpace)
  5    [0x12c00000, 0x2ac00000)             main space (region space)             ← ContinuousSpace (RegionSpace)
  4    [0x0, 0x0)                           large object space                   ← DiscontinuousSpace (LOS)
```

`TYPE` 编号对回 AOSP `space.h:35-41` 的 `enum SpaceType`：
```cpp
enum SpaceType {
    kSpaceTypeImageSpace = 0,
    kSpaceTypeMallocSpace = 1,
    kSpaceTypeZygoteSpace = 2,
    kSpaceTypeBumpPointerSpace = 3,
    kSpaceTypeLargeObjectSpace = 4,
    kSpaceTypeRegionSpace = 5,
};
```

所以上面 0/0/5/4 四个数字就是 `kSpaceTypeImageSpace` / `kSpaceTypeImageSpace` / `kSpaceTypeRegionSpace` / `kSpaceTypeLargeObjectSpace`。

## 5. 修正我之前回答里的**两个错误**

| 我之前说的 | 实际（AOSP master 验证后） |
|---|---|
| "`LargeObjectSpace` 唯一常见实现，没有 Begin/End" | ❌ 错。AOSP 有 2 个 LOS 实现：`LargeObjectMapSpace`（kMap，离散）和 `FreeListSpace`（kFreeList，**有 begin/end，连续 + 内部 free-list**）。基类 `LargeObjectSpace` 自己也实现了 `Begin()/End()`（当前已分配范围）。 |
| "RegionSpace 内部由 N 个 Region 组成，对外是 ContinuousSpace" | ✅ 对。AOSP 注释里 RegionSpace 继承 `ContinuousSpace`，是一段连续 mmap。 |
| "Card table 不覆盖 LOS" | ✅ 对。AOSP `space.h` 注释明确："the card table can't cover these objects"。 |

## 6. 实战：判断一段地址属于哪种空间

```cpp
// OCAK cmd_space.cpp 走的就是这个判定
for (const auto& space : heap.GetContinuousSpaces()) {
    // 一定有 [Begin, End)
}
for (const auto& space : heap.GetDiscontinuousSpaces()) {
    if (space->IsLargeObjectSpace()) { /* LOS 路径 */ }
    else { /* 其它非连续，只显示 Ptr */ }
}
```

OCAK `android/art/runtime/gc/heap.h:55-56` 把 AOSP 的 `std::vector<Space*>` 改成了 `std::vector<std::unique_ptr<Space>>`，**这才是 `cmd_space.cpp` 里 `space.get()` 那个 `.get()` 调用的来源**——但底层判断逻辑（`IsLargeObjectSpace` / `IsContinuousSpace` / `IsDiscontinuousSpace`）仍然是 AOSP 上游的。

## 7. 一句话总结

| 维度 | `ContinuousSpace` | `DiscontinuousSpace` |
|---|---|---|
| 父类 | `Space` | `Space` |
| 必有字段 | `begin_` / `end_` / `limit_` | 无 |
| 标记位图 | `ContinuousSpaceBitmap`（按位） | `LargeObjectBitmap`（按对象） |
| 物理地址 | 连续一整段 | 离散（kMap） 或 连续但有空洞（kFreeList） |
| Card table | 支持 | **不支持** |
| 对象能否移动 | 视子类（RegionSpace 可，ImageSpace 不可） | **不可**（LOS 永远 false） |
| `space` 命令输出 | `[Begin, End)` 区间 | 只显示 `Ptr` + Name |
| 典型代表 | ImageSpace / RegionSpace / MallocSpace / BumpPointerSpace / FreeListSpace | LargeObjectMapSpace (kMap) |

## 8. 知识来源

- **[Web 搜索 - serper] "art ContinuousSpace DiscontinuousSpace LargeObjectSpace AOSP master gc space.h class hierarchy"** → 命中 AOSP `heap.cc`、`space.h`（辅助）
- **[Web 搜索 - tavily] "AOSP art runtime gc space ContinuousSpace DiscontinuousSpace RegionSpace LargeObjectSpace main 2026"** → 命中 AOSP `heap.cc`（LiveBitmap 走 `ContinuousSpaceBitmap`、LOS 走 `LargeObjectBitmap`）
- **[Web 搜索 - MiniMax] "ART堆内存空间 ContinuousSpace DiscontinuousSpace ImageSpace RegionSpace LargeObjectMapSpace FreeListSpace 分类"** → 命中 CSDN `u014099894`、腾讯云 2400064、Luoshengyang 博客（5 篇 ART 源码分析）
- **[AOSP master - `art/runtime/gc/space/space.h` 0-8000 段 + 8000-14000 段]**（已抓取）
  - `ContinuousSpace` 三个指针 `begin_/end_/limit_` + `ContinuousSpaceBitmap`
  - `DiscontinuousSpace` 无 `Begin()/End()`，用 `LargeObjectBitmap`
  - `enum SpaceType` 6 个值（Image/Malloc/Zygote/BumpPointer/LargeObject/Region）
  - `IsLargeObjectSpace()` / `IsContinuousSpace()` / `IsDiscontinuousSpace()` 判定函数
- **[AOSP master - `art/runtime/gc/space/large_object_space.h` 0-10160 段]**（已抓取）
  - `enum class LargeObjectSpaceType { kDisabled, kMap, kFreeList }`
  - `LargeObjectMapSpace`（kMap，每个大对象单独 mmap）字段：`large_objects_`（`AllocationTrackingSafeMap<Object*, LargeObject, kAllocatorTagLOSMaps>`）
